notes: Authority sources in the manifest are real public sources reviewed on 2026-03-21 with explicit refresh cadence and decay policy.
Evaluation coverage includes normal guidance, governance handling, failure and replay modes, evidence-backed recommendation quality, out-of-scope rejection, and low-confidence escalation.
Shared-meta-agent contracts are documented in the manifest; the local package remains the specialist-owned delta and defines fallback behavior when shared services are unavailable.
Local repository validation is recorded separately through npm run lint and npm test before PR creation.
